name: Lam

skills.name: Hunter
skills.description: Basic Attacks and skills deal extra true damage to targets with low Health

skills.name: Wavebreaker
skills.description: Lam enters “Submerged” state, greatly increasing his Movement Speed for 3 seconds. When the duration ends, Lam leaps out of the water, immediately restoring 50% of this skill’s cooldown. While in Submerged state, casting the skill again will cause Lam to surface early, dealing 300 (+120% Bonus Physical Attack) Physical Damage to nearby enemies and slowing their Movement Speed by 50% for 1.5 seconds. Passive: While in river terrain, the Submerged state has no time limit. If an enemy hero with below 30% Health appears within 1500 range, Lam gains 450 Movement Speed.

skills.name: Space Split
skills.description: Damages nearby enemies while gaining a mark. Basic Attacks spend marks to gain a dash and Health recovery effect. While submerged, Skill 2 has an extra dash effect.

skills.name: Death From Below
skills.description: Throws a dagger in the target direction, then dashes to the dagger after a short delay, dragging enemies in his path to the dagger and dealing damage to them. Submerged: Cancels the cast animation and skill delay.

tips: Lam (Assassin): Tier A on international ranked — 48.8% WR.
Build core: Relentless Blade, Boots of Tranquility, Axe of Torment.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 48.8%, pick 1.01%, ban 0.48%, popularity tier A.
Counters Lu Bu, Wuyan, Xiang Yu · Weak into Erin, Liang, Luara.

faqs.question: Is Lam good in current season?
faqs.answer: Lam is Tier A Assassin with 48.8% win rate, 1.01% pick rate, and 0.48% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Lam build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Relentless Blade, Boots of Tranquility, Axe of Torment, Rapacious Bite, Pure Sky, Spikemail. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Lam?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Lam: Erin, Liang, Luara. Lam is strong into Lu Bu, Wuyan, Xiang Yu.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Lu Bu, Wuyan, Xiang Yu. Countered by: Erin, Liang, Luara.
